warnings.warning: Previous broad cleanup caused project ID fragmentation (2026-03-28). Three different IDs were generated for the same folder, breaking user memory continuity.

WINDOWS SUBPROCESS RISK
Previous bug: subprocess.run(timeout=...) with git/processes caused hangs on Windows due to inherited handles.
Use the safe wrapper from core/windows_subprocess.py.
Do not introduce raw subprocess.run(..., timeout=...) for git/process orchestration without Windows QA.

DASHBOARD PROJECT SWITCH RISK
Previous bug: dashboard showed stale project after AI switched project context.
When changing active_project / selected_project_id logic, verify dashboard updates to the current AI project, not just any active project.
Run dashboard project selection tests.

PROJECT CLASSIFICATION RISK
Previous bug: real user project named TestProject was incorrectly classified as test provenance and hidden from dashboard.
Do not classify by broad substring like 'testproject'.
Run classification/dashboard tests after changes.
